engine: Clinical Intelligence Engine for Neuro-Oncology, Epilepsy, and LITT

history.note: Trailing-2-month deltas. Clinical/peer-reviewed sweep found little genuinely new in-window (headline 2026 LITT items date Feb-Apr 2026, just before window, already in corpus). New items were ecosystem/competitive (GT Medical $100M Series E, NeuroOne OneRF, Medtronic Neuroscience leadership change, uniQure/ClearPoint AMT-130 FDA path) and selection-imaging/systemic (Pixclara 18F-FET NDA, RAD101 Phase 2b, zongertinib NEJM CNS data, INDIGO extended follow-up). Database 136 -> 144.

history.window: provenance pass on the 29 partial items
history.note: Re-checked every partial item against primary sources via 3 fact-check agents. 23 upgraded to verified, 5 remain partial, 1 flagged unverified (LITT-vs-craniotomy-deep-seated-2025, no citable source). Corrected dates/DOIs on ~12 items; fixed AI/Raman sample size 500+ -> 278; softened CNS-2019-guideline LITT framing. Verified flags overall: 107->135 verified, 29->8 partial, +1 unverified.

Deep historical rebuild extending baselineStartDate to 2015. Six web-enabled domain agents (neuro-oncology, LITT, epilepsy, regulatory, adjacent/competitive, ecosystem/lay-press) fanned out across journals, registries, regulators, conferences, and reputable general/business press. Filled the empty 2015-2019 window and the thin indications: corpus_callosotomy 0->3, meningioma 1->5, lower-grade glioma. Added the first lay-press/policy and MR-guided focused-ultrasound competitor signals. Database 58 -> 136 items; every item dated. Provenance: 107 verified / 29 partial; publisher/PubMed full-text fetches were proxy-blocked (403), so figures rest on cross-checked search metadata and some are flagged UNVERIFIED rather than laundered.

Reconciled run: deduplicated concurrent intra-day passes (merged 3 event-twins) into a single authoritative surveillance record. Database 31 -> 41 items. LITT-specific and epilepsy domains had no verifiable in-window items.

Curated landmark backfill extending the library to 2020 from verified references (LAANTERN registry, AANS-CNS/CNS guidelines, BBB-permeability mechanism, MTLE durability, REMASTer RCT, RN & combination evidence). Database 41 -> 58 items. Reliable citation-level provenance; not an exhaustive bibliography.
